metadata.source: Follow-up from Live Register v1 first slice.

title: Promote live candidates to registry PR
goal: Design and implement a reviewed candidate-to-registry promotion path for live candidate_task events.

acceptance.assertion: Promotion requires a reviewed plan and creates reviewable registry diff only.
Promoted tasks preserve live event id, source, repo and non-claims.
Promotion does not automatically add candidates to now/next without a queue decision.
